records.title: Dupilumab, IL4R signaling, and type 2 inflammation in atopic dermatitis
records.abstract: Fixture-only record: dupilumab inhibits IL4R signaling in type 2 inflammation and treats atopic dermatitis. Safety discussion includes conjunctivitis.

records.title: IL13 pathway association with asthma
records.abstract: Fixture-only record: IL13 and the Th2 pathway are associated with asthma. Further studies are required to test clinical efficacy, dose, comparator, and safety.

records.title: Type 2 inflammation and respiratory phenotype signals
records.abstract: Fixture-only record: eosinophils and IgE are biomarkers of type 2 inflammation in patients with asthma and eosinophilia.
